scroll_found.title: Research the Food Preservation scroll at a Research Pedestal

preserve_food.title: Preserve 5 food items using Salt or the Smoke Rack — prevent food rot

know_the_system.title: Learn: food rots if left in warm conditions (Freeze It & Heat It mod). Cold biomes, ice boxes, and smoking slow the process.

subtitle.text: Freeze It & Heat It — food has a lifespan. Plan accordingly.

description: CH.02 · FOOD PRESERVATION
▸ Freeze It & Heat It adds food spoilage.
Food left in warm or neutral conditions rots over time.
Rotten food gives debuffs instead of nutrition.
Preservation extends food lifetime significantly.
◈ PRESERVATION METHODS
└ ❄ Cold Storage: ice boxes, snow biomes,
underground cellars — slows rot dramatically
└ 🧂 Salt Curing (Hearth & Harvest): apply salt
to raw meat/fish — extends shelf life
└ 🔥 Smoking (FD Smoke Rack): smoked food rots
much slower than cooked-only food
└ 🌡 Heat: hot food kept warm on stove stays
at peak saturation longer
◈ PRIORITY ORDER
└ Immediate use: eat fresh, no preservation needed
└ Short journey (2-3 days): smoke or salt
└ Long journey / Nether: smoke + cold carry
└ Base storage: cold cellar + salt reserves
◈ SCROLL: Food Preservation
└ Found in: cellar chests, storage ruins,
old pantry loot, underground vault chests
└ Research time: 20 min
└ Unlocks: full rot system awareness, cold storage tips
▸ The Nether (Ch06) has no cold.
Everything you bring will be racing the clock.
Pack smoked. Pack salted. Pack enough.
▶ Find the Food Preservation scroll [check]
▶ Preserve 5 food items using Salt or Smoke Rack [check]
▶ Learn the food rot system (read this) [check]
◇ Cold Sweat temperature (Ch01) and food rot interact.
Cold biomes = slower rot + higher thirst drain.
Balance them.
